credits

important note: anything not credited here was likely made by me, and is not for free use unless otherwise stated! futhermore, if any graphics used were created by you and wish to be removed from this site, please contact me and i’ll happily remove them!

graphics

  • flower bullets, diamond bullet, arrows, background: fool lovers
  • header gif: pinterest but i’m fairly sure it’s from howl’s moving castle

code

  • guestbook widget : ayano’s neocities comment widget
  • guestbook widget moderation : frills’ moderation add-on
  • guestbook admin verification : loveberry’s admin verification add-on
